diagnostics.message: Pump Suction is missing temperature and flow rate specifications.
Pump Discharge is missing pressure specification.
Transfer Pump is missing outlet pressure target for the current transfer scenario.

payload.system:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

content.text: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-same-risk-input-first-ordering-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","locale":"zh-CN","requires_confirmation":true,"answers":[{"status":"partial","summary":"当前围绕选中的 Transfer Pump (pump-2) 及其进出口流股 (feed-8, product-8) 生成候选编辑提案。三条诊断均为 error 级别：进口流股缺少温度与流量规格、出口流股缺少压力规格、泵单元缺少出口压力目标参数。求解器因参数不完整处于 invalid_parameters 状态。以下提案为占位式补全，具体数值需用户根据实际工况确认后方可生效。","confidence":0.72,"issues":[{"description":"feed-8 (Pump Suction) 缺少 temperature_c 和 flow_rate 规格，导致求解器无法确定进口状态。","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]},{"description":"product-8 (Pump Discharge) 缺少 pressure_kpa 规格，出口压力未定义。","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-2","snapshot-1"]},{"description":"pump-2 (Transfer Pump) 缺少 outlet_pressure_target_kpa 参数，泵的传输场景无法求解。","citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"补全 Pump Suction 进口流股的温度与流量占位规格","target":"stream:feed-8","rationale":"诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING 指出 feed-8 缺少 temperature_c 和 flow_rate。添加占位值以使求解器能够初始化进口状态；占位值需用户根据实际工况确认。","patch":{"spec_placeholders":{"temperature_c":{"placeholder_value":25,"unit":"°C","needs_confirmation":true,"note":"默认环境温度占位，请根据实际进料温度修改"},"flow_rate_m3_per_h":{"placeholder_value":50,"unit":"m³/h","needs_confirmation":true,"note":"默认流量占位，请根据实际工况修改"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]},{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"补全 Pump Discharge 出口流股的压力占位规格","target":"stream:product-8","rationale":"诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING 指出 product-8 缺少 pressure_kpa。添加占位值以定义出口压力；占位值需用户确认。","patch":{"spec_placeholders":{"pressure_kpa":{"placeholder_value":500,"unit":"kPa","needs_confirmation":true,"note":"默认出口压力占位，请根据管网背压或下游设备要求修改"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-2","snapshot-1"]},{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"补全 Transfer Pump 出口压力目标参数","target":"unit:pump-2","rationale":"诊断 UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE 指出 pump-2 缺少 outlet_pressure_target_kpa。添加占位参数以使泵在传输场景下可求解；该值应与出口流股压力规格保持一致，需用户确认。","patch":{"parameter_placeholders":{"outlet_pressure_target_kpa":{"placeholder_value":500,"unit":"kPa","needs_confirmation":true,"note":"应与 product-8 的 pressure_kpa 保持一致，请根据实际扬程需求修改"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"]}],"citations_index":[{"key":"diag-1","label":"诊断：feed-8 缺少温度与流量规格","source":"diagnostics[0]"},{"key":"diag-2","label":"诊断：product-8 缺少压力规格","source":"diagnostics[1]"},{"key":"diag-3","label":"诊断：pump-2 缺少出口压力目标","source":"diagnostics[2]"},{"key":"flowdoc-stream-1","label":"流股 feed-8 (Pump Suction) 定义","source":"flowsheet_document.streams[0]"},{"key":"flowdoc-stream-2","label":"流股 product-8 (Pump Discharge) 定义","source":"flowsheet_document.streams[1]"},{"key":"flowdoc-unit-1","label":"单元 pump-2 (Transfer Pump) 定义","source":"flowsheet_document.units[0]"},{"key":"snapshot-1","label":"最新求解快照：invalid_parameters","source":"context.latest_snapshot"}]}]}

answers.text: 当前围绕选中的 Transfer Pump (pump-2) 及其进出口流股 (feed-8, product-8) 生成候选编辑提案。三条诊断均为 error 级别：进口流股缺少温度与流量规格、出口流股缺少压力规格、泵单元缺少出口压力目标参数。求解器因参数不完整处于 invalid_parameters 状态。以下提案为占位式补全，具体数值需用户根据实际工况确认后方可生效。

proposed_actions.title: 为 feed-8 补充缺失规格占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断已明确指出该流股规格不完整，因此更合适的是补局部规格占位，而不是给整图 patch。

proposed_actions.title: 为 product-8 补充缺失规格占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断已明确指出该流股规格不完整，因此更合适的是补局部规格占位，而不是给整图 patch。

proposed_actions.title: 为 pump-2 补充局部参数占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断集中在局部参数或配置完整性，因此更合适的是输出可审查的局部参数占位提案。
